message:
test(ftui-extras): improve underwater_warp.rs test coverage (bd-3g6pi)

Add 19 new tests (26→45 total) covering quality tier ordering,
high amplitude clamping, edge dimensions (1x1, 0xN, Nx0, 2x2),
grow-only buffers, turbsin symmetry/edge cases, render dimension
caching, determinism with custom params, and amplitude/frequency
sensitivity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
